title: zshrc — too many open files
html: Stub. The error Yahir hit on May 4, 2025: /Users/yahirgonzalez/.zshrc:source:4: too many open files. Fix: ulimit -n 4096 (or fix the recursive source). Captured in the same screenshot as the dump. First mentioned in 2025 05 04 apple notes osascript titles dump.

related.label: osascript Apple Notes title dump — May 4 2025 (visual capture)
Web Inspector — local dev 500 errors against 127.0.0.1:41416
